info.title: SignatureAPI
info.description: Electronic signature API for creating envelopes, managing documents, recipients, ceremonies, and deliverables.

post.description: Creates a new envelope containing documents and recipients for signing.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of envelopes.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-20, default 20).

get.description: Returns the details of an envelope.

label.description: Internal identification label, not shown to recipients.

delete.description: Deletes an envelope. Only envelopes with status canceled, completed, or failed can be deleted.

post.description: Cancels an in-progress envelope. Only envelopes with status in_progress can be canceled. This action is irreversible.

reason.description: Explanation for cancellation. Internal use only, included in webhook payload.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of events for an envelope.

post.description: Creates a new deliverable for a completed envelope.

get.description: Returns the details of a recipient.

post.description: Replaces a recipient who has not yet completed their actions. The new recipient inherits the original's type, key, routing position, and assigned places.

name.description: Full name of the replacement recipient.

email.description: Email address of the replacement recipient.

post.description: Resends the signing invitation to a recipient. Subject to rate limiting. Recipient status must be sent or soft_bounced.

can_resend_at.description: Time after which the next resend can be initiated, in ISO 8601 format.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of events for a recipient.

post.description: Creates a new signing ceremony for a recipient.

get.description: Returns the details of a deliverable including a pre-signed download URL that expires after 1 hour.

parameters.name: deliverable_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the deliverable.

post.description: Uploads a file (PDF, DOCX, or PNG) for use in envelope documents. Maximum file size is 5 MB.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Test keys start with key_test_, live keys start with key_live_.

EnvelopeId.name: envelope_id
EnvelopeId.description: The unique identifier of the envelope, in UUID format.

RecipientId.name: recipient_id
RecipientId.description: The unique identifier of the recipient.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the problem.

ValidationError.description: Validation error response conforming to RFC 7807.

next.description: URL to the next page of results.

previous.description: URL to the previous page of results.

documents.description: Documents to include in the envelope.

url.description: Publicly accessible URL to the document file.

places.description: Signature fields, text inputs, and other interactive elements.

PlaceInput.description: A place defines a field or interactive element on a document. The type determines which additional fields are required.

value.description: Text value for text type places.

requirement.description: Whether the field is required or optional.

format.description: Validation format (email, zipcode-us, or regex pattern).

line_height.description: Line height in points for multiline_text_input.

options.description: Options for dropdown type. Can be an array of label/value objects or a predefined enum string.

place_key.description: Key of the place to position.

top.description: Distance from top edge in points.

left.description: Distance from left edge in points.

completed_at.description: When the recipient completed their actions.

ceremony_creation.description: How the ceremony was created (e.g., automatic).

embeddable_in.description: Origins allowed to embed the ceremony in an iframe.

message_override.description: Custom email message with Markdown support (for email_link type).

provider.description: Company or application name (required for custom type).

logo.description: URL to a PNG logo file.

accent_color.description: Hex color code with minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio.

footer.description: Email footer text with Markdown support.

type.description: Deliverable type. Standard includes an audit log.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for audit log (standard type only).

timestamp_format.description: MomentJS format for audit log timestamps (standard type only).

DeliverableConfig.description: Deliverable configuration as returned in an envelope.

url.description: URL for use in envelope documents.
